wikifunctions-rest-module-v0-fetch-param: Pipe-separated list of ZIDs to fetch, with a maximum of 50 per request
Pipe-separated list of revision IDs, one per requested ZID, to fetch historic versions; if omitted, the latest revision of each ZID is returned
BCP-47 language code to use when resolving multilingual labels in the returned ZObjects; if omitted, all languages are returned
Whether to additionally return the ZObjects referenced as types in the keys or arguments of the requested ZObjects
wikifunctions-rest-module-v0-fetch-respo: A map from each requested (and, if getDependencies is set, dependency) ZID to its ZObject serialised as a JSON string
A ZObject serialised as a JSON string, as returned by the page-content representation endpoint
wikifunctions-rest-module-v0-call-zid-ar: Call a function, with custom parse and render languages
wikifunctions-rest-module-v0-call-param-: ZID of the function to call
Pipe-separated list of arguments to pass to the function, in the order in which its arguments are declared, with each argument URL-encoded
BCP-47 language code used to parse string-valued arguments that have a parser function; defaults to 'en'
BCP-47 language code used to render the function's output and any error messages; defaults to 'en'
wikifunctions-rest-module-v0-call-respon: The result of evaluating the function call
The evaluated output as a string; either a plain string (for Z6) or an HTML fragment (for Z89)
The ZID of the type of the evaluated output: 'Z6' for a plain string, 'Z89' for an HTML fragment
